description_long: This is a single bed with a robust, dark wooden frame featuring thick, squared posts at each corner. The bed includes a prominent headboard and a slightly lower footboard, both constructed from the same dark wood with a smooth, polished finish. A beige mattress sits atop the frame, accompanied by a matching pillow positioned near the headboard. The bedding consists of a brown, textured blanket that covers most of the mattress, leaving a portion of the mattress and pillow exposed. The overall design is sturdy and utilitarian, with clean lines and a modern yet slightly rustic aesthetic. The bed appears suitable for use in a residential or urban environment, such as a bedroom or dormitory.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden single bed with a thick frame, headboard, footboard, beige mattress, pillow, and a brown textured blanket.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, with the pillow and part of the mattress visible near the headboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, pillow, and the width of the bed frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow positioned near the headboard and the blanket covering most of the mattress.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the footboard and the solid wooden construction of the frame.
